<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="n-18m4yETggVSB8Nss0H"> <mxGraphModel dx="1489" dy="1930" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="805" y="1580" width="1200" height="880" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="SLI
Service Level Indicator
e.g. success_rate = 2xx / total" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1192.05" y="1600" width="419.74" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="SLO
Service Level Objective
e.g. 99.9% over 30 days" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1192.05" y="1780" width="417.95" height="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="Error Budget
(1 - SLO) x window
= 0.001 x 43200 min = 43.2 min" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#e1d5e7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1190" y="1960" width="420" height="101.75" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Burn Rate
(1 - SLI) / (1 - SLO)
How fast budget is consumed" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1189.48" y="2140" width="420" height="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="7" value="Healthy
No budget consumed" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="850" y="2350" width="229.24" height="83.83" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="8" value="Within budget" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1086.89" y="2350" width="193.11" height="83.83" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="Exactly at
budget rate" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1288.04" y="2350" width="223.93" height="83.83" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="Critical
2% of 30-day
budget gone" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1525.53" y="2350" width="229.54" height="81.91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="Warning
Budget exhausted
in ~5 days" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1770" y="2350" width="210" height="81.91" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="measured against" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia light;fontSize=20;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;endSize=10;startFill=1;startSize=8;" edge="1" source="4" target="5" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" value="consumption speed" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;endSize=10;startFill=1;startSize=8;" edge="1" source="5" target="6" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="15" value="= 0" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.151;exitY=0.995;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code </mxCell> <mxCell id="17" value="= 1" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code 14.4 for 1h" style="startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.659;exitY=1.005;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Cascadia code div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 418px; height: 1px; padding-top: 70px; margin-left: 388px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 20px; font-family: 'Cascadia code light'; color: #000000; line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
SLI

e.g. success_rate = 2xx / total
